name_en: Grey and Milky White in stock!!️
name_cn:
Grey and Milky White in stock!!️
Original factory lining with cashmere✔️Classic Lady Diana Bag, a must-have 3-compartment small bag for everyone😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, can be worn crossbody or handheld for a feminine look. Classic and stylish. A beauty bag that many fashion icons have on Instagram, don't miss it❤️
size:17cm
